     ['B']

     ['C']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Root/B/C>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /_class_A1/B/C
    ref.usd              /A1/B/C
    ref2.usd             /C
    ref2.usd             /C{v1=C}
    ref2.usd             /C{v2=Z}
    ref2.usd             /B/C
    ref2.usd             /B/C{v1=C}
    ref2.usd             /B/C{v2=Z}
    ref2.usd             /A/B/C
    ref2.usd             /A/B/C{v1=C}
    ref2.usd             /A/B/C{v2=Z}

Variant Selections:
    {v1 = C}
    {v2 = Z}

Child names:
     ['v2_Z', 'v1_C']
